title: Welcome 2 The Party
full_title: Welcome 2 The Party by LEX (JPN) (Ft. Shark kid)

LEX「Welcome 2 The Party ft. Shark kid」の歌詞

目の前はOceanのBeauty ah
I can't wait happy day yeah

I just feeling summer
Just feeling summer
Just feeling summer
Just feeling summer

Just feeling summer

Maybe u wanna see me?

Welcome to the crazy party yeah

このGreat life
